SEARCH

Uses of Class
common.dto.ServerEvent

Packages that use ServerEvent
Package
Description
client.net
Client networking: the persistent TCP connection to the server and the event bus that delivers server-pushed real-time updates.
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
common.dto
Serializable data transfer objects and enums shared by client and server.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.net
Server networking: the OCSF-style TCP server that accepts client connections, tracks each ClientSession, routes incoming ClientRequests to the domain layer via RequestRouter, and reports lifecycle events through the ServerListener callback interface.
server.subscription
Real-time push registry: SubscriptionRegistry maps subscription keys (e.g.

  • Uses of ServerEvent in client.net

    Fields in client.net with type parameters of type ServerEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final Consumer<ServerEvent>
    EventBus.Subscription.cb
    The registered callback.
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<SubscriptionKey,List<Consumer<ServerEvent>>>
    EventBus.subscribers
    Subscriber callbacks keyed by subscription key.
    Methods in client.net with parameters of type ServerEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    EventBus.dispatch(ServerEvent ev)
    Looks up the subscriber list for the event's (entity, entityId) pair and fan-outs to each callback via Platform.runLater(java.lang.Runnable).
    Method parameters in client.net with type arguments of type ServerEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) void
    EventBus.removeSubscriber(SubscriptionKey key, Consumer<ServerEvent> cb)
    Removes cb from the subscriber list for key.
    EventBus.Subscription
    EventBus.subscribe(SubscriptionKey key, Consumer<ServerEvent> cb)
    Registers cb to be invoked on the FX thread whenever the server pushes an event for key.
    Constructor parameters in client.net with type arguments of type ServerEvent
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    private
    Subscription(SubscriptionKey key, Consumer<ServerEvent> cb)
    Creates a subscription handle.

    Methods in client.view with parameters of type ServerEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    MainShellController.onNotificationEvent(ServerEvent ev)
    Handles a pushed notification event (already marshalled onto the FX thread by EventBus).
    private void
    ReservationListController.onReservationEvent(ServerEvent ev)
    Reacts to a pushed reservation change.
    private void
    WaitlistController.onReservationEvent(ServerEvent ev)
    Reacts to a pushed reservation change by reloading the list.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    BaseController.subscribe(String entity, long entityId, Consumer<ServerEvent> cb)
    Registers interest in the entity identified by (entity, entityId).

    Methods in common.dto that return ServerEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ServerEvent
    ServerEvent.created(String entity, long id, Serializable payload)
    Builds a CREATED event for a freshly inserted entity.
    static ServerEvent
    ServerEvent.deleted(String entity, long id)
    Builds a DELETED event.
    static ServerEvent
    ServerEvent.updated(String entity, long id, Serializable payload)
    Builds an UPDATED event for a modified entity.

  • Uses of ServerEvent in server.control

    Methods in server.control with parameters of type ServerEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    ReservationController.publishReservation(ServerEvent event)
    Fans a reservation change out to every client subscribed to that reservation id, via the shared SubscriptionRegistry (the same realtime-push path the order domain uses).

  • Uses of ServerEvent in server.net

    Methods in server.net with parameters of type ServerEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ClientSession.sendEvent(ServerEvent ev)
    Pushes an unsolicited event from the server to this subscribed client.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SubscriptionRegistry.publish(SubscriptionKey key, ServerEvent event)
    Fans event out to every session subscribed to key.
